# Ruta Pacifico

> Private airport shuttle service from Liberia Airport (LIR) to beaches, resorts, and destinations across Guanacaste and Costa Rica.

## About

Ruta Pacifico is a licensed and fully insured ground transportation company based in Liberia, Guanacaste, Costa Rica. We provide private airport transfers from Daniel Oduber Quirós International Airport (LIR) and point-to-point shuttle service to destinations throughout Costa Rica.

## Services

- **Airport Shuttles**: Private pickup at LIR with direct transport to any beach, resort, or town in Guanacaste. Also available to La Fortuna, Monteverde, and beyond.
- **Inter-Beach Shuttles**: Private rides between coastal towns — Tamarindo, Flamingo, Conchal, Nosara, Papagayo, Sámara, and more.
- **Cross-Country Shuttles**: Long-distance private transfers from Guanacaste to La Fortuna, Monteverde, Manuel Antonio, San José, and other regions.

## Key Details

- All prices are fixed, per vehicle (not per person), and include taxes and tolls
- Real-time flight tracking — pickup adjusts if your flight is early or late
- Bilingual drivers (English and Spanish)
- Modern air-conditioned fleet: Hyundai Staria (1–6 pax), Toyota Hiace (7–9 pax), Maxus V90 (10–12 pax)
- Service available 7 days a week, any hour

## Popular Routes from LIR

- LIR → Tamarindo: ~50 min
- LIR → Flamingo / Conchal: ~1 hr
- LIR → Papagayo Peninsula: ~30 min
- LIR → Nosara / Sámara: ~2 hrs
- LIR → Playas del Coco: ~25 min
- LIR → Las Catalinas: ~1 hr
